title: Bee Baby Teething Toy | Aged 3 Months + | Baby Toys
features: Bee Shaped Teething Aid: The perfect toy for soothing sore gums and relieving teething discomfort, the baby teether is lightweight, and easy for little hands to grip. Youngsters can chew and suck on the teething toy to their heart's content with multiple teething surfaces to try.

Multisensory Development: Made of bright colours, interesting shapes and a cute, friendly face to encourage visual stimulation, it even makes sounds to stimulate little ears, too. Encourage early development across all the senses.

Develop Gross Motor Skills: Help to develop hand eye coordination and general motor skills. The teether is designed with small hands in mind, as is easy for young hands to grab on to, perfect for playing with as well as chewing on!
Safe: The baby teether is safety tested and made from BPA free materials
The bee baby teether is suitable for children aged 3 months or older.
description: Product Description Baby Bee Rattle Auditory and visual stimulation Helps develop gross motor skills Safety Tested Size: 12 x 9 x 3cm approx. Recommended for ages 3 months and up BRAND NEW QUICK DISPATCH Safety Warning Suitable for ages 3+
